hero.title: Choose your perfect ring-making package
hero.description: Each package follows the same artisanal method with different timing and depth.

packagesSection.heading: All offers in detail
packagesSection.description: Browse every package and choose the one that matches your trip and your pace.

packages.name: Essential
packages.summary: A compact format to create one handcrafted ring from start to finish.
packages.fullDescription: A guided introduction to ring making where you design, shape, solder, and polish your piece with our team at every step.

packages.name: Couple Ritual
packages.summary: A shared format designed for two people creating rings together.
packages.fullDescription: A full couple experience with personalized guidance for both rings, synchronized steps, and optional engraving for a shared memory.

packages.name: Signature
packages.summary: Extended session with premium customization and slower creative flow.
packages.fullDescription: Our most complete package with expanded design time, deeper technical support, and advanced customization options for a truly personal result.
packages.idealFor: Travelers seeking a fully custom keepsake

gemstonesLink.heading: Discover our gemstones
gemstonesLink.description: See the currently available stones and choose the one that best fits your ring.
